Intelligence at every stage of the deal.

Sales Saathi gives your team an unfair advantage by injecting AI directly into your CRM, calendar, and video calls.

AI Pre-Meeting Briefs

Automatic dossiers aggregating CRM history, 10-K filings, and recent news minutes before every call.

Smart Ice-Breakers

Build immediate rapport using hyper-personalized hooks generated from prospect LinkedIn activity.

Live AI Meeting Coach

Real-time transcriptions analyze sentiment and surface battlecards instantly when prospects raise objections.

"We don't have the budget right now."
Suggested Rebuttal "Our ROI typically covers the cost in 2 months..."

AI Meeting Summaries

Automated structured notes, MEDDPICC parsing, and action items pushed directly to your CRM.

Follow-Up Automation

Draft hyper-relevant next-step emails while you're still on the call, ready to hit send.

Outreach Generator

Scale outbound efforts with highly personalized 1-to-1 messaging cadences at a click of a button.

AI Deal Risk Predictor

Forecast pipeline health by parsing stakeholder engagement levels and historical BANT data.

Relationship Intelligence

Visualize power dynamics and unearth hidden mutual connections to multithread deals effectively.

How it works

A seamless four-step engine that runs on autopilot.

1

Connect Systems

Securely link your CRM & Calendar via robust OAuth integrations.

2

Autonomous Mining

AI scrapes prospect data, news, and financials in the background.

3

Live Guidance

Receive real-time tactical prompts during your live discovery calls.

4

CRM Writeback

Notes, sentiment, and next steps auto-sync perfectly back to your CRM.

Frequently Asked Questions

We offer native, one-click OAuth integrations for Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive. Once connected, Sales Saathi automatically pulls historical context before meetings and pushes structured notes, custom field updates, and action items back instantly after the call ends.
Absolutely not. Sales Saathi is SOC2 Type II certified. Your data is siloed, encrypted at rest and in transit, and strictly never used to train public foundation models. Enterprise plans offer dedicated single-tenant infrastructure options.
Our proprietary acoustic models transcribe calls with 98% accuracy and parse objections in under 400 milliseconds. The battlecard prompts are generated based on your own customized playbooks to ensure responses remain perfectly on-brand.
Yes. You can seamlessly upgrade from Monthly to Annual billing at any point from your dashboard to take advantage of the 20% discount. Pricing is pro-rated automatically.
Yes, full RESTful API and Webhook access is available on the Team and Enterprise plans, allowing you to route intelligence data directly into custom internal BI tools or data lakes.
